patch.value: Document capture_level semantics for extension authors

The three capture levels (minimal/redacted/max) are enforced for core commands but undocumented for extension authors; the activation context exposes settings.telemetry.capture_level but no guidance exists.

SDK.md+EXTENSIONS.md gain a Telemetry & privacy section explaining levels+redaction and how to read capture_level from activation; optional advisory doctor lint when a telemetry-capability extension reads no telemetry setting; no core redaction change.

The three capture levels (minimal/redacted/max) are enforced for core commands but undocumented for extension authors; the activation context exposes settings.telemetry.capture_level but no guidance exists.
